member.name: T:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI
member.summary: Handles public methods for interacting with PR's backup system.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestBackup(PolicingRedefined.API.EBackupUnit,PolicingRedefined.Backup.Entities.EBackupResponseCode,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches the requested unit to the player's current position. For air units refer to and for prisoner transport refer to .
member.remarks: Calling this method with the 'dispatchAnim' parameter set to 'true' will hold up the fiber (that the method was called on) until the animation is done.
member.param: The type of unit to request.
The response code the unit should use.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestBackup(PolicingRedefined.API.EBackupUnit,PolicingRedefined.Backup.Entities.EBackupResponseCode,Rage.Vector3,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches the requested unit to the provided destination. For air units refer to and for prisoner transport refer to .
member.remarks: Calling this method with the 'dispatchAnim' parameter set to 'true' will hold up the fiber (that the method was called on) until the animation is done.
member.param: The type of unit requested.
The response code the unit should use.
The destination of the unit.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestTrafficStopBackup(PolicingRedefined.API.EBackupUnit,PolicingRedefined.Backup.Entities.EBackupResponseCode,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches the requested unit to an active traffic stop.
member.remarks: Calling this method with the 'dispatchAnim' parameter set to 'true' will hold up the fiber (that the method was called on) until the animation is done.
member.param: The type of unit to request.
The response code the unit should use.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestAirBackup(PolicingRedefined.API.EBackupUnit,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches the requested air unit to the current pursuit.
member.param: The type of air unit (, ) requested.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the air unit was successful.
member.remarks: Only available during pursuits.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestPoliceTransport(PolicingRedefined.Backup.Entities.EBackupResponseCode,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches a prisoner transport unit to pick up the nearest arrested suspect.
member.param: The response code the unit should use.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the prisoner transport was successful.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestPanicBackup(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches panic backup units to the player's current position.
member.param: Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

member.summary: Creates and dispatches panic backup units to the provided destination.
member.param: The destination of the panic backup.
Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.

member.summary: Creates and dispatches group backup units to the provided destination.

Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestSpikeStripsBackup(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and dispatches a spike strips units to intercept a pursuit vehicle.
member.param: Whether to display a dispatch request notification.
Whether to play a dispatch request animation on the player.
Whether to play a dispatch audio after the unit was dispatched.
member.returns: Whether the dispatch of the unit was successful.
member.remarks: Only available during pursuits.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.RequestTowServiceBackup
member.summary: Opens a UI menu where the player is able to choose what tow truck type it wants. Upon selecting the plugin will attempt to get the nearest vehicle and send the desired unit to tow it.
member.returns: Returns 'false' when the menu is already open.
member.remarks: Will always show a dispatch notification and play a dispatch anim/audio.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.InitiateFelonyStop
member.summary: Opens a UI menu where the player is able to choose in which mode the felony stop should be started.
member.returns: Returns 'false' when there is no traffic stop, the menu is already open or a felony stop is already active.
member.remarks: Does not show any dispatch notification nor plays a dispatch anim/audio.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.DismissAllBackupUnits(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Dismisses all active and responding backup units.
member.param: If true, it will clear the unit's tasks instead of waiting until a running task finished.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.BackupAPI.SpawnLocalBackup(PolicingRedefined.API.EBackupUnit,Rage.Vector3,Rage.Vehicle@,System.Collections.Generic.List{Rage.Ped}@)
member.summary: Spawns a local variation of the requested unit at the specified position.
member.remarks: This method only spawns the entities into the world without any handling or AI by PR.
member.param: The unit to spawn.
The position to get the local variation at and to spawn the unit at.
The spawned vehicle of the unit.
The spawned peds of the unit.
member.returns: Whether the unit was spawned. Make sure to verify the existence of the entities.

The position to get the local variation at.
The position to spawn the unit at.
The spawned vehicle of the unit.
The spawned peds of the unit.
member.returns: Whether the unit was spawned. Make sure to verify the existence of the entities.

member.summary: Spawns local ped variations of the requested unit at the specified position. Each ped is a randomized variant.

The heading of the peds.

members.member:
Handles (almost) all events throughout the plugin.
More events here.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedSurrendered
member.summary: Invoked when a ped surrenders after e.g. being tazed.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedPatDown
member.summary: Invoked when a ped was pat down.
member.remarks: This is not invoked when a dead ped was searched.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnDeadPedSearched
member.summary: Invoked when a peds dead body is searched

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedArrested
member.summary: Invoked when a ped was arrested through PR's system.
member.remarks: Note: This is not invoked when a ped was arrested through LSPDFR.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedStopped
member.summary: Invoked when a ped was stopped.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedReleased
member.summary: Invoked when a stopped ped was released.
member.remarks: Note: The released ped might not exist in the game world anymore.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedAskedToExitVehicle
member.summary: Invoked when a ped was asked to exit the vehicle on a traffic stop.
member.remarks: Note: This can also be a passenger, it doesn't need to be the driver.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnDriverAskedToTurnOffEngine
member.summary: Invoked when the driver was asked to turn off the engine on a traffic stop.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnVehicleStopped
member.summary: Invoked when a vehicle was stopped.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnIdentificationGiven
member.summary: Invoked when ped gives the player an ID or driver's license.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnDriverIdentificationGiven
member.summary: Invoked when driver of stopped vehicle gives the player an ID or driver's license.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnOccupantIdentificationGiven
member.summary: Invoked when passenger of stopped vehicle gives the player an ID or driver's license.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnRequestPedCheck
member.summary: Invoked when the player requests dispatch to run a peds info

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnPedRanThroughDispatch
member.summary: Invoked when dispatch responds to the players request with info

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnRequestVehicleCheck
member.summary: Invoked when the player requests dispatch to run a vehicles info

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.EventsAPI.OnVehicleRanThroughDispatch
member.summary: Invoked when dispatch responds to the players request with info

member.name: T:PolicingRedefined.API.EGivenIdentification
member.summary: Represents the type of identification given by a ped.

member.summary: The ped gave an ID card.

member.name: F:PolicingRedefined.API.EGivenIdentification.DriversLicense
member.summary: The ped gave a driver's license.

member.name: T:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopDelegate
member.param: The on-foot traffic stop this event was fired.

member.summary: Handles public methods for interacting with PR's on-foot traffic stops.

member.summary: Invoked when the player starts an on-foot traffic stop.

member.name: E:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.OnFootTrafficStopEnded
member.summary: Invoked when an on-foot traffic stop ends.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.GetCurrentOnFootTrafficStop
member.summary: Gets the current on-foot traffic stop the player is on.
member.returns: The handle for the on-foot traffic stop.
member.remarks: Returns 'null' if player is not on one.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.IsOnAnyFootTrafficStop
member.summary: Returns whether the player is currently on an on-foot traffic stop.
member.returns: True if the player is on an on-foot traffic stop.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.IsOnFootTrafficStop(PolicingRedefined.Engine.Entities.PRHandle)
member.summary: Returns whether the player is currently on the specified on-foot traffic stop.
member.param: The handle for the on-foot traffic stop that should be checked.
member.returns: True if the player is on the specified on-foot traffic stop.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.GetOnFootTrafficStopVehicle(PolicingRedefined.Engine.Entities.PRHandle)
member.summary: Gets the main vehicle of the specified on-foot traffic stop.
member.param: The handle for the on-foot traffic stop.
member.returns: The vehicle of the on-foot traffic stop.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.OnFootTrafficStopAPI.GetOnFootTrafficStopSuspect(PolicingRedefined.Engine.Entities.PRHandle)
member.summary: Gets the main suspect of the specified on-foot traffic stop.
member.param: The handle for the on-foot traffic stop.
member.returns: The suspect of the on-foot traffic stop.
member.remarks: This the original driver of the vehicle that the on-foot traffic stop was initiated with.

member.name: T:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI
member.summary: Handles public methods for interacting with PR's ped system.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedMood(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets the mood of the specified ped during questioning.
member.param: The ped to get the mood of.
member.returns: The current mood of the ped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.IsPedDrunk(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped is drunk.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped's BAC is above 0.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedBAC(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Get the blood alcohol concentration of the specified ped.
member.param: The ped to get the BAC of.
member.returns: The BAC of the ped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.IsPedHigh(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped is high.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped is on any drug.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetDrugsPedIsOn(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets the drugs the specified ped is on.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: The drugs that the ped is on.
member.remarks: This is enum is a flag as a ped can be on multiple flags. You need to extract the flags from the returned value.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.IsPedStopped(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped is stopped by PR.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped is stopped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.IsPedArrested(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped is arrested by PR.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped is arrested.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedMood(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.PedAttributes.EPedMood)
member.summary: Sets the mood of the specified ped during questioning.
member.param: The ped to set the mood of.
The new mood to set.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedDrunk(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.PedAttributes.EDrunkLevel,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Makes the specified ped drunk.
member.param: The ped to set as drunk.
How drunk the ped should be.
Whether to change the walkstyle of the ped based on the drunk level. True by default.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedDrunk(Rage.Ped,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Makes the specified ped drunk by changing the BAC.
member.param: The ped to change the BAC of.
The BAC amount to set.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedHigh(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Makes the specified ped high on a random drug.
member.param: The ped to set as high.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedHigh(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.EDrugType)
member.summary: Makes the specified ped high on specific drugs.
member.param: The ped to set as high.
The drugs the ped should be high on.
member.remarks: The enum is marked as flags and therefore the ped can be set to be high on multiple drugs.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedHasBeenPatDown(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped has been searched.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped has been searched.
member.remarks: Note that this is also true when the ped is dead and was then searched (in contrast to pat down event).

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.IsPedResistingRightNow(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped is executing a resistance action right now.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped is resisting right now.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedResistanceChance(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets the probability for the specified ped to resist.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: The chance that the ped will resist (0 to 100).

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedResistanceChance(Rage.Ped,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the probability for the specified ped to resist.
member.param: The ped to check.
The chance that the ped will resist (0 to 100).

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedResistanceAction(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets the resistance type of the specified ped.
member.param: The ped to get the resistance type of.
member.returns: The resistance type of the ped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedResistanceAction(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Modules.Resistance.EResistanceAction)
member.summary: Sets the resistance type of the specified ped.
member.param: The ped to set the resistance type of.
The resistance type the ped should use.
member.returns: True if the resistance action was changed successfully.
member.remarks: Returns false when the ped is executing a resistance action right now, the resistance action was set to be kept or when the ped is arrested and the requested resistance action was something else than and .

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedResistanceAction(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Modules.Resistance.EResistanceAction,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the resistance type of the specified ped.
member.param: The ped to set the resistance type of.
The resistance type the ped should use.
Whether this resistance action should be forced for the ped. See for more info.
member.returns: True if the resistance action was changed successfully.
member.remarks: See for more information on the return result.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetShouldWalkAwayBeforeResisting(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped will walk away from the officer shortly before starting the resistance action.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped will walk away before resisting.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetShouldWalkAwayBeforeResisting(Rage.Ped,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the specified ped will walk away from the officer shortly before starting the resistance action.
member.param: The ped to set the flag for.
Whether the ped should walk away.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetKeepResistanceAction(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets whether the specified ped should keep their set resistance action. For example: When the ped's resistance action is set to and the player attempts to interact with the ped a few times, then there is a chance that the ped will change their resistance action and e.g. attack the player. However, when 'KeepResistanceAction' is set to true then the ped will not change their resistance action, no matter how often the player attempts to interact with the uncooperative ped.
member.param: Ped to get the flag for.
member.returns: True if the ped should keep their resistance action.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetKeepResistanceAction(Rage.Ped,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the specified ped should keep their set resistance action. See for more info.
member.param: Ped to set the flag for.
Whether the ped should keep their set resistance action.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedSurrenderChance(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Gets the probability for the specified ped to surrender (put hands up) after e.g. being tazed.
member.param: The ped to get the surrender chance of.
member.returns: Chance for the ped to surrender (0 to 100).

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedSurrenderChance(Rage.Ped,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the probability for the specified ped to surrender (put hands up) after e.g. being tazed.
member.param: The ped to set the surrender chance of.
Chance to set (0 to 100).

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetIsPedExcludedFromCustomPursuitAttributes(Rage.Ped)
member.summary: Returns whether the specified ped is being excluded from PR's custom pursuit attributes.
member.param: The ped to check.
member.returns: True if the ped is being excluded from custom pursuit attributes.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetIsPedExcludedFromCustomPursuitAttributes(Rage.Ped,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the specified ped should be excluded from PR's custom pursuit attributes.
member.param: The ped to exclude/include from custom pursuit attributes.
Whether the ped should be excluded or not.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GiveCitationToPed(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.PedAttributes.Citation)
member.summary: Gives a citation to the specified ped.
member.param: The ped to give the citation to.
The citation to give.
member.remarks: Best suited for computer plugins. The 'Ped' field of the object must match the ped parameter.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GiveFirearmToPed(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.FirearmItem,System.Int16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gives a firearm (gun) to the specified ped. This adds the firearm item to the ped's search items as well as to the GTA inventory.
member.param: The ped to give the firearm to.
The firearm to give to the ped.
The amount of ammo the ped should get.
Whether the ped should equip the firearm now.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.RemoveFirearmFromPed(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.FirearmItem)
member.summary: Removes a firearm (gun) from the specified ped. This removes the firearm item from the ped's search items as well as from the GTA inventory.
member.param: The ped to give remove firearm from.
The firearm to remove from the ped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GiveWeaponToPed(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.WeaponItem,System.Int16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gives a weapon (melee) to the specified ped. This adds the weapon item to the ped's search items as well as to the GTA inventory.
member.param: The ped to give the weapon to.
The weapon to give to the ped.
The amount of ammo the ped should get.
Whether the ped should equip the weapon now.
member.remarks: This is intended for melee weapons (knifes...), not throwables (molotov...). However, it shouldn't cause too much issues when still used with throwables.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.RemoveWeaponFromPed(Rage.Ped,PolicingRedefined.Interaction.Assets.WeaponItem)
member.summary: Removes a weapon (melee) from the specified ped. This removes the weapon item from the ped's search items as well as from the GTA inventory.
member.param: The ped to give remove firearm from.
The weapon to remove from the ped.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.GetPedCauseOfDeath(Rage.Ped,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Sets a custom cause of death for a ped that will be displayed by coroners.
member.param: The ped to set it for.
Whether the current COD requires an autopsy. See for a detailed explanation.
member.returns: The current custom set cause of death of the ped. Returns null if none was set.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetPedCauseOfDeath(Rage.Ped,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets a custom cause of death for a ped that will be displayed by coroners.
member.param: The ped to set it for.
The cause of the ped's death.
Whether this COD should be disclosed on scene or whether coroners need to perform an autopsy first.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.API.PedAPI.SetInterceptPedAnyArrest(Rage.Ped,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PR only takes over arrests that are done during pursuits, by the player or by a backup ped. Setting this to 'true' will make PR take over ANY arrest that is done on this ped.
member.param: The ped to set it for.
Whether to intercept all arrests.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.Engine.Hooking.MethodRedirection.RedirectMethodTo(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Redirects a .NET managed method to a .NET managed target method. The target method must match the signature of the origin method. When hooking instance methods, the target method must have an 'object @this' as the first argument. If you want to be able to call the origin method after hooking use .
member.param: Method to redirect.
Method to redirect to. Must be static.
member.returns: An instance of if successful; 'null' if hooking failed.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.Engine.Hooking.MethodRedirection.RedirectMethodTo(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Redirects a .NET managed method to a .NET managed target method while using a 3rd method as proxy to allow calling the origin method. Both the target and proxy method must match the signature of the origin method. When hooking instance methods, the target and proxy methods must have an 'object @this' as the first argument.
member.param: Method to redirect.
Method to redirect to. Must be static
Empty (e.g. returning a default value) method which can be hooked by the origin method to support calling of the origin method. Must be static.
member.returns: An instance of if successful; 'null' if hooking failed.

member.name: M:PolicingRedefined.Engine.Hooking.ManagedMethodHook.InvokeOrigin(System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes the origin method using the provided arguments.
member.param: The provided arguments. If the origin method is not static, make sure to provide an 'object @this' as the first array entry, which represents an instance of the owning class or struct.
member.returns: The return value of the origin method.

member.name: T:PolicingRedefined.Engine.Utility.Resources.WeightedList`1
member.summary: This implements an algorithm for sampling from a discrete probability distribution via a generic list with extremely fast O(1) get operations and small (close to minimally small) O(n) space complexity and O(n) CRUD complexity. In other words, you can add any item of type T to a List with an integer weight, and get a random item from the list with probability ( weight / sum-weights ).

member.summary: Create a WeightedList with the provided items and an optional System.Random.
